title: Northwestern University
text: Home * Organizations * Northwestern University Technological Institute, Post Lakefill, 1977 [1] Northwestern University in Evanston and downtown Chicago , Illinois , United States . The Vogelback Computer Center headed by Ben Mittman was the first building constructed on the Lakefill in Evanston [2] .
